title: cirsium araricum
intro: Cirsium araricum, also known as the Armenian thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and fever. The health benefits of Cirsium araricum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, with the roots often being used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
